query_normalized: predicting insect pollinator networks from floral trait data biology
rationale: The paper studies primate social networks and their relationship to cognitive/structural factors, which is an entirely different empirical domain (animal behavior/sociology) and mechanism (social complexity) than the user's question regarding insect pollinator networks and floral traits (plant-pollinator ecology). It fails to satisfy any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it does not measure the same variables, mechanisms, or populations, nor does it provide a foundational methodology specific to trait
